doze.configuration.tip.sleepOutside: Toggles whether players can sleep outside.
doze.configuration.tip.minimumLight: The minimum ambient light level required for sleep. Set to 0 to disable.
doze.configuration.tip.bedsExplode: Toggles whether beds explode in dimensions like the Nether.
doze.configuration.tip.compatibility: Don't mess with these unless you know what you're doing!
doze.configuration.tip.healthPerHour: The amount players will heal per hour slept. I don't know why you'd ever want this higher than 3, but here you go.
doze.configuration.tip.hungerCost: The cost of hunger per health regained during sleep. Set to 0 to disable.
doze.configuration.tip.tickHour: If you use a mod that alters time, make sure this setting matches the length (in ticks) of a day.
doze.block.minecraft.bed.too_dark: You can't sleep here, it's too dark.
doze.block.minecraft.bed.dimension_nethe: You can't sleep here, it's much too warm.
doze.block.minecraft.bed.dimension_end: You can't sleep here, they won't let you...
doze.block.minecraft.bed.dimension_mod: You can't sleep in this dimension.
